title: You guys are AWESOME
author: Ewout
message: Hell yeah what a year! I absolutely loved the social events, and the exam preps were literal lifesavers. I still can't believe the change I went through and the amazing people I've met just because 7 silly goobers woke up and chose to give us a fantastic year. Thanks so much, I can't wait to see you again next year and stay fucking awesome!
